programmes.show_description: Klaus and Rogu in 'Thank God for Loose Rocks': US animated comedy. When the family goes to a ranch, Klaus and Rogu have to work together to survive in the wilderness.
Russian Doll: Animated comedy series. Stan becomes infatuated with a doll that the CIA wants to use to spy on the Russians.
Reality show hosted by Olivia Attwood. The chefs still have everything to prove as the race to become star chef hots up, but snogging on the dancefloor takes priority for some.
Bad Seeds: The final episode of the US mystery crime drama series. Birdie, Catherine, Brett and Alice struggle to tie up loose ends as suspicions mount days after the gala.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Come Undone: Animated series. Discovering the true Heart of the Jaguar, the Mystery Inc gang work as a team to stop the Evil Entity from bringing about the end of the world.
Beware the Beast from Below: Animated fun with Scooby-Doo and the gang. A hideous sewer beast is accidentally released from a radioactive barrel in the town of Crystal Cove.
Game of Chicken: Animated adventure series. Fred gets a call for help from his best friend to lead the gang on a rescue mission deep in the caverns of an ancient civilisation.
All Paws on Deck: Animated adventure series. The gang climb aboard a cruise ship run by Fred's cousin, but a water phobia is the least of their problems when a sea monster attacks!
Sunset Condo Toronto: House-hunting show. Paul and Katie enlist the help of estate agent Erica Smith to find their first home, but finding the perfect sunny property is a challenge.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. The Shepherds head to Abu Dhabi for their first work trip abroad as a family of five, and it's extra-special as it's Margot's first-ever holiday.
Reality series. Bombshell news sends shockwaves through the Essex crew on a night out, Dan and Ella are happier than ever, and Harry decides to focus on himself.
Mamacita Madness Part One: US reality series. Alexia discovers that she must vacate her home in 15 days, and Nicole takes a DNA test to try to find more unknown siblings of hers.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part One: US reality series. The diamonds of Beverly Hills come face-to-face for a reunion where Dorit confronts Kyle about a text message she received.
Childhood sweethearts Bianca and Ky - and husband-and-wife team Charlie and Helen - hope that Ant and Dec can give away the biggest cash prize in quiz show history this time.
Graham Norton welcomes three new players - social media coach Hannah, fragrance expert Samuel, and hairdresser Sophie - as they face a series of puzzles to win 50,000 pounds.
Reality series. Emotions run high when Jodie and Diags discuss their split, tensions rise when Dani and Harry bump into Junaid and Freddie, and Dan invites his mum to meet Ella.
Divide and Conquer: Reality series. Seema and Nicole try to bring back peace and harmony after Lystra and Rachel's explosive row leaves a rift among the group.
Mamacita Madness Part Two: US reality series. Chaos continues at Nicole's mamacita lunch as Lisa unleashes her rage on the women, and Alexia and Marysol come face to face with Ana.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part Two: US reality series. The reunion continues as Sutton and Kyle's issues come to a head and jeopardise their friendship like never before.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show and asks Shirley Ballas, Bhavna Limbachia, and Dr Ranj Singh to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
Graham Norton invites civil servant Becca, programme insights lead Kurt, and police analyst Soraya to spin the wheel and avoid bankrupts to win a possible 50,000 pounds.
Ant and Dec invite cousins Adele and Adele and engaged couple Zanesh and Melike to climb up their never-ending money ladder as both pairs look to win a truly life-changing prize.
Reality show hosted by Olivia Attwood. The pressure in the kitchen reaches boiling point as two chefs go head-to-head, but romance is well and truly on the menu when service ends.
Rich Old Stewie: In a future in which Stewie has made is fortune and is living a life of luxury, Brian brings news that Stewie's father, Peter, is dying.
Peter and Lois' Wedding: When the wi-fi goes out in the Griffin house, Peter and Lois take the kids on a trip back to the '90s to hear about how they met and fell in love.
Heart Burn: The Griffins are in a storytelling mood again, and recount their own versions of three famous love stories in celebration of Peter and Lois' anniversary.
The Wondercabinet: US animated comedy. Steve gets into New Age mysticism after discovering that life as an adult will be nothing but misery and cynicism.
Stan Moves to Chicago: Stan is upset when he discovers an old college friend had gone on to a successful comedy career and tries to restart his career by moving to Chicago.
Reality show hosted by Olivia Attwood. The pressure in the kitchen reaches boiling point as two chefs go head-to-head, but romance is well and truly on the menu when service ends.
Cheaty Cheaty Bang Bang: Animated comedy. Tina tries to clear her name when she believes that another student has accused her of cheating, and a snowstorm traps the Belchers.
Oh Row You Didn't: Animated comedy. Bob and Gene almost get swept out to sea when they attempt to move the rowing boat of a man trying to row from New Zealand to Nova Scotia.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
Secret of the Ghost Rig: Animated fun with Scooby-Doo and the gang. A mysterious ghost trucker terrorises Crystal Cove, but the gang have their hands full with other mysteries.
The Creeping Creatures: Animated adventures. Scooby and the gang spend the night in Gatorsburg, where they soon discover that gators are still around - and walking on two legs.
Poodle Justice: Animated adventure series. When the gang visits the set of Scooby's favourite TV show, he must work up the courage to talk to its star and stop a monstrous gargoyle!
Grand Scam: Animated adventure series. Shaggy takes the gang to the Minor League Baseball stadium of his youth, but he learns that it's about to be shut down because of a ghost!
Three single ladies battle to win the affections of Black Country barber Josh. Will their style choices bag them a date?

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. Tensions in the Shepherd household are high as Billie and Greg are in the middle of a huge bust-up, but will they make up before Greg's birthday?
Reality series. Emotions run high when Jodie and Diags discuss their split, tensions rise when Dani and Harry bump into Junaid and Freddie, and Dan invites his mum to meet Ella.
Mamacita Madness Part Two: US reality series. Chaos continues at Nicole's mamacita lunch as Lisa unleashes her rage on the women, and Alexia and Marysol come face to face with Ana.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part Two: US reality series. The reunion continues as Sutton and Kyle's issues come to a head and jeopardise their friendship like never before.
Ant and Dec invite cousins Adele and Adele and engaged couple Zanesh and Melike to climb up their never-ending money ladder as both pairs look to win a truly life-changing prize.
Graham Norton welcomes three new players - cleaner Fillie, business manager Craig, and university graduate Becky - as they spin the Wheel while solving puzzles to win cash prizes.
Reality series. The group head off for a well-earned break in sunny Bali. Dani feels guilty for keeping a secret from Harry but, as the two get closer, will she tell him?
A Night of Intrigue and... Aubergines?!: Reality series. Lauren and Ell put the ladies through their paces as things get rather colourful thanks to Nick and Royston.
Invite Only: US reality series. Marysol hosts a shopping spree luncheon, Nicole is brought to tears after learning that she is being iced out, and Julia forces Adriana to come clean.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Reunion Part Three: US reality series. The reunion concludes with a surprise appearance from familiar face Kathy Hilton, but her presence draws mixed reactions.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Sir Chris Hoy, Martine McCutcheon, and Faye Tozer all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
Graham Norton welcomes three new players - social media coach Hannah, fragrance expert Samuel, and hairdresser Sophie - as they face a series of puzzles to win 50,000 pounds.
There's more life-changing money on offer as Ant and Dec welcome engaged couple Zanesh and Melike back to the show before father-and-son team David and Mark play a remarkable game.
Reality show hosted by Olivia Attwood. It's judgement day as the six remaining chefs fight it out for two places in the final before a celebration with one last night in Barcelona.
The Movement: Peter, the coach of Quahog's minor league baseball team, becomes the face of social justice when he kneels during the national anthem after eating too much shrimp.
Baby Stewie: Stewie sets out to create a machine that will help him remain clever forever, but instead it transforms him into an actual baby.
Shanksgiving: Peter searches for a way to avoid Lois's special family Thanksgiving dinner and resorts to getting arrested. Plus, a big secret of Stewie's is revealed.
Little Bonnie Ramirez: After a series of boring personas, Roger goes to great lengths to prove to Francine he still has his edge - but his plan spirals out of control.
